subject: Tema
Tài liệu chi tiết về năng lực thiết kế,: Podrobna dokumentacija o načrtovanju, gradnji in delovanju industrijskih hladilnih sistemov po mednarodnih standardih podjetja Thebloomgroup.
Tầng 14, Tòa nhà HM Town, 412 Nguyễn Thị: 14. nadstropje, stavba HM Town, ulica Nguyen Thi Minh Khai 412, okrožje 3, HCMC
Thebloomgroup cung cấp các giải pháp làm: Thebloomgroup nudi intenzivne hladilne rešitve za skladišča, predelovalne centre in logistiko.
Thiết kế và thi công hệ thống điện lực,: Načrtovanje in gradnja elektroenergetskih sistemov, oskrbe z vodo, odvodnjavanja in HVAC za obsežne projekte.
Đảm bảo sự ổn định tuyệt đối cho hạ tầng: Zagotavljanje popolne stabilnosti digitalne infrastrukture s hladilnimi rešitvami in rezervnim napajanjem.

industry_me_c4_desc: Čiščenje odpadnih voda, oskrba s čisto vodo
industry_ref_factor_1_desc: Kakovost opreme je temelj delovne učinkovitosti.

industry_lifecycle_desc: We accompany customers from ideation to stable operation.
lifecycle_s1_desc: Survey and propose optimal technical solutions.
lifecycle_s3_desc: Ensuring stable and reliable 24/7 system operation.
industry_me_banner_sub: Thebloomgroup is committed to absolute progress, quality and safety for all electromechanical items.
advanced_tech_subtitle: THEBLOOMGROUP pioneers the application of the most advanced preservation solutions.
tech_banana_desc: Scientific artificial ripening process control system, ensuring uniformity and attractive color.
tech_blast_desc: Extremely fast cooling of product core temperature to -35°C, preventing large ice crystals.
tech_detail_blast_desc: Blast Freezer system designed to lower product core temperature to -35°C extremely fast, preventing large ice formation and ensuring peak freshness after thawing.
tech_detail_ca_desc: CA technology is the most advanced preservation solution today, extending the freshness of agricultural products by adjusting O2, CO2, and N2 concentrations in cold storage.
tech_detail_iqf_desc: IQF technology allows quick freezing of individual product pieces, preventing large ice crystal formation and perfectly protecting cell structure and nutritional value.
tech_detail_ripening_desc: Scientific fruit ripening solution (especially for bananas), ensuring uniform ripeness, attractive color, and the most natural flavor retention.
tech_detail_ca_feature1: 24/7 monitoring of O2, CO2, N2 and Ethylene
tech_detail_ca_feature2: Extends storage life up to 12 months (apples, pears)
tech_detail_ca_feature3: Prevents growth of bacteria and natural mold
tech_detail_iqf_feature3: Products do not stick, maintaining original shape
tech_detail_ripening_feature2: Forced ventilation for even heat distribution
tech_detail_blast_feature2: Optimized air velocity for different food types
history_p1: Founded in 2003, Thebloomgroup began its journey with the desire to conquer the peaks of cooling technology.
history_p2: From a unit specialized in installation, we expanded into design consulting and production of precision cooling mechanical components.
history_p3: Today, Thebloomgroup is proud to be a strategic partner for many multinational corporations and key infrastructure projects.
home_prod_cat1_desc: Trane, Daikin, York - High efficiency, energy saving
home_prod_cat2_desc: Insulated panels, ISO standard cold storage doors
home_prod_cat3_desc: Multi-connection solutions for buildings and villas
vietvinh_difference_desc: Driven by the consciousness that cold storages are the hidden heroes of the food industry, THEBLOOMGROUP takes every step to store food in the best possible way through R&D focused engineering and smart controllers.
home_news_subtitle: Stay updated with our latest activities, advanced technology and industry insights.
home_projects_subtitle: Real-world projects demonstrating our execution capacity and quality solutions across various industries.
home_products_subtitle_dist: We are a strategic partner of the world's leading refrigeration brands, providing international standard technical supplies.
industry_me_banner_text: Premier Technical Solutions For All Scales
refrigerant_natural_desc: Eco-friendly, highly efficient with low operating costs for large-scale facilities.
refrigerant_freon_desc: Popular and easy to maintain solutions for small and medium-sized projects.
bulk_quote_request_desc: Contact our project department to receive preferential pricing and technical support.
industry_me_desc: Comprehensive electromechanical solutions for all scales.
